name: so101
author: dorarobotics
description: Control an SO-101 (LeRobot 5-DOF) arm: sense the object/plate and run high-level pick-and-place over the SPEC-VENDOR-NODE-V1 bridge.

tools.name: get_object_position
tools.description: Return the current (x, y) position of the object (red cube) the arm should pick, in meters. Call this before pick_at.

tools.name: get_plate_position
tools.description: Return the (x, y) position of the green target plate to place the object on, in meters.

tools.name: pick_at
tools.description: Pick up the object at (x, y) meters: approach from above, grasp, and lift. Use the coordinates from get_object_position.

x.description: object x in meters (robot base frame)

tools.name: place_at
tools.description: Carry the currently-held object to (x, y) meters and release it. Call pick_at first. Use the coordinates from get_plate_position.
